title: Lavender's Delight - A Farmer's Delight Addon
description: A personal addon mod for Farmer's Delight, it adds things that are cottage-core inspired and items from other video games that I think are cute or cool :3
body:
A personal addon mod for [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight). It adds things that are cottage-core inspired, as well as things from other video games like Skyrim & Dark Souls.

Peaches & Lemons - These two fruits are the two main fruits ive added so far, they make deserts and treats that can benefit the player in other ways besides saturation, like potion effects and healing. Lemon Trees can only be bought from a Farmer Villager since lemons technically aren't natural growing trees, Cutting lemons gives you seeds which can be planted to give you a new lemon tree. Peach Trees can ONLY be found in forests.

Gravel Ore - I remember gravel ore in older mods I used to play when I was a kid and It was something I really liked, I only added Iron-rich Gravel so its not so OP.

Geode - Small Geodes that are dropped From 'Porous Sediment' that can be placed and broken with a Pickaxe and have a small chance of dropping a gem or some gold.

Wild Mint & Mint Crops - Wild Mint can be found in Colder and Temperate Biomes, breaking it drops Mint Leaves and its seed item which is 'Rooted' Mint and this can be planted to cultivate mint. Wild Mint can be harvested with shears to drop itself and this can be potted.

Halite & Salt - Halite is a block that forms on the beach near the ocean, it replaces sandstone and sand. Breaking it gives you salt and this can make Cheese and Salted Meat which is basically jerky, it provides slightly more saturation than cooked beef but can only be made with meats under the tag: meats.json

Cheese Wheel & Wedge - Cheese Wheels can be made with Milk and Salt, which can be placed onto a cutting board (or for decoration) and cut into 4 wedges, Cheese Wedges can be made into Cheese & Berries.

Plants - Lavender, White Blossom, & Rose are plants that can be found in the wild, Lavender can be used to make a Lavender Dumpling and purple dye. White blossom can make white dye and is purely decoration. Both can be potted. Roses from older versions of minecraft can be found in patches with rose bushes. Roses can also be potted.

Flowering Blossom - Flowering Blossom is an edible plant that can be found in the wild, this gives you a speed boost for 8 seconds and can be grown to have an endless supply.

Dreamcatcher - Small 3D Model decorative block that can be placed inside your home or wherever :3

I also backported a couple paintings from 1.21 that I liked

Added a music disc that plays "Glowing" by Jens Kiilstofte
